title: Translating C++ Code with Templates to Rust Code with Generics
scenario: A user wants to translate a complex C++ code with templates into equivalent Rust code with generics. The Rust code must be readable, maintainable, and efficient. The user needs help on how to define the Rust functions and handle templates such as type inference. The target Rust code must be accurate and well-documented.
constraints: Must use the latest Rust syntax
Must include a brief explanation of the translation process

evaluationCriteria.description: The accuracy of the C++ to Rust code translation
The readability and maintainability of the Rust code
The accuracy and correctness of the Rust generics used
The quality and clarity of the documentation provided
